text.title: Web Scraping Agentic Workflow Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: scraping a news listing across 30 daily runs; drift caught on day 18 when the source switched its CSS-module hash; recovery via role/text locators.

section.title: Day 18 — source-side rebuild
section.p: Source rebuilt with new CSS-modules hash; class `.article-title` became `.css-7xy9z2`. Day-18 run with original selectors:

section.title: Day 19 fix
section.p: Engineer replaces `.article-title` with `h2[role=heading]` (the structural locator that survived the CSS rebuild). Day-19 run returns to drift_score 0.0 and rows_valid restored.
